_meta.rangeConvention: usagePercent ranges are [inclusive, exclusive). null = unbounded. Example: [70, 100] means >= 70% AND < 100%.
_meta.templateVariables: {sessionTotal}, {sessionUsed}, {usagePercent} — interpolated at render time with locale-formatted numbers.

rules.title: Action Required: Visit limit reached
rules.description: Your site has exceeded its free monthly limit of {sessionTotal} visits. Cookie autoblocking is now disabled, which means tracking scripts may fire before visitors consent. Upgrade to Pro immediately to restore full compliance protection.

rules.title: Approaching your visit limit
rules.description: Your site is nearing its free monthly limit ({sessionUsed} / {sessionTotal} visits). If you exceed the limit, cookie autoblocking will be disabled. Upgrade to Pro now for unlimited coverage.

rules.title: Upgrade for unlimited coverage
rules.description: Free protects up to {sessionTotal} visits/month. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited visits, geo-targeting, and extended consent logs.

rules.title: Your banner shows — but nothing is blocked
rules.description: Scripts fire before consent. Connect free to protect.
rules.ctaSmall: No credit card · protects up to 10,000 visits / month

rules.title: Protected, with gaps to close
rules.description: Close the gaps below to fully cover your ad stack.
rules.ctaSmall: Unlimited visits · every consent mode · lifetime records

rules.title: You’re about to lose protection
rules.description: You’ve used {usagePercent}% of your monthly limit — protection switches off at 100%.

cta.label: Upgrade before you hit the limit →

rules.title: Protection paused — limit reached
rules.description: Limit reached — protection is paused. {sessionUsed} / {sessionTotal} visits used.
